scripts.package:dev: npm run build:dev && mkdir -p builds && cd dist && zip -r -X "../builds/kotiq-guard-dev-v$npm_package_version-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M).zip" . && cd ..
scripts.package:prod: npm run build:prod && mkdir -p builds && cd dist && zip -r -X "../builds/kotiq-guard-prod-v$npm_package_version-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M).zip" . && cd ..
